title: Posting pictures in the speech bubble
excerpt: in the speech bubble, when a picture is uploaded, the ability to copy and paste that image vs saving the images each time i need to send them in an email would be so convenient. also clicking on the image and enlarging i…

posts.author: Amanda115 (Amanda)
posts.cookedHtml: in the speech bubble, when a picture is uploaded, the ability to copy and paste that image vs saving the images each time i need to send them in an email would be so convenient. also clicking on the image and enlarging it/ zoom would be very handy!
